steps.name: TUI: Detail mode overlay rendering
criteria: When model.mode == AppMode::Detail, view() renders a detail overlay instead of the commit table
Overlay shows full (un-truncated) date, time, message, folder, and URL of the selected commit
When URL is None, overlay shows '— not available —' for the URL line
Overlay uses a bordered Block with title 'Commit Detail'
Esc returns to Browse (already handled by domain; view only reads model.mode)
Selected row position (model.cursor) is preserved after returning from Detail (already handled by domain)
steps.implementation_notes: In view.rs render_main_area(), add a branch: if model.mode == AppMode::Detail, call render_detail_overlay(model, frame, area). render_detail_overlay reads model.filtered_rows[model.cursor] (safe because Detail mode only entered when filtered_rows is non-empty), renders a Paragraph inside a bordered Block. Lines: 'Date: {date}', 'Time: {time}', 'Message: {message}', 'Folder: {folder}', 'URL: {url or — not available —}'. Status bar in Detail mode shows 'Esc to return' via render_status_bar (update format_status_text or add detail branch). Pure render — no state mutation.

validation.note: 1-step scope for slice-04. Domain transitions (Enter→Detail, Esc→Browse) already shipped in slice-01. Remaining: Detail mode view rendering (04-01).
